title: BareBonesPvP
description: A PvP pack for BareBones by TwstedTard
body: This pack makes the items and models of the BareBones TexturePack have more of a PvP feel. (I made all the textures from scratch and did not edit any BareBones assets. (im working on another version of this pack without the BareBones Style, I just started with this style because it was easier.
